title: Create: Haven Qualities
description: Adds more blocks, items and recipes, an addon for Create.
body:
![Create: Haven Qualities](https://i.imgur.com/SOYEK7i.png)

  
[![](https://i.imgur.com/WQb5y3A.png)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/haven)

Haven Qualities is an addon for create (v0.5.1d) that adds more blocks, items and recipes to Create better qualities.

Check out Showcase & Recipes for what this mod includes.

Any issues, bugs or crashes **MUST** go through the issues page.

_This mod is work in progress._

Update 1.0.1 Showcase:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/snoYVez8pX8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![](https://i.imgur.com/KYe133v.png)

**Recipes:**

**Casings:** (manual right click with item works too)

![](https://i.imgur.com/j3CzALi.gif)

Not sure whether to have images or text so i'll put text for now (comment to change my mind)

**Recipes using Crusher:**
*   Blaze Powder > 4x Blaze Dust
*   Coal > 4x Coal Dust  _(yes this conflicts black dye recipe, use mill for dye instead)_
*   Diamond > 4x Diamond Dust
*   Gold Ingot > 4x Gold Dust
*   Iron Ingot > 4x Iron Dust
*   Lapis Lazuli > 4x Lapis Dust _(yes this conflicts blue dye recipe, use mill for dye instead)_
*   Netherite Scrap > 4x Netherite Dust
*   Quartz > 4x Quartz Dust  
    
**Recycle Recipes using Crusher to recycle back to craft items:**
*   Copper Diving Boots
*   Copper Diving Helmet 
*   Netherite Armor
*   Diamond Armor
*   Gold Armor
*   Iron Armor 
*   Leather Armor
*   Netherite Tools & Weapons 
*   Diamond Tools & Weapons 
*   Gold Tools & Weapons 
*   Iron Tools & Weapons (shears and shield not included)
*   Bucket
*   Attribute Filter 
*   List Filter 
*   Book 
*   Enchanted Book 
*   Brass Sheet 
*   Copper Sheet 
*   Gold Sheet 
*   Iron Sheet 
*   Electron Tube 
*   Polished Rose Quartz 
*   Blaze Burner 
*   Brewing Stand 
*   Copper Block 
*   Creeper Head 
*   Deepslate 
*   Dragon Head 
*   Empty Blaze Burner 
*   Enchanting Table 
*   Gilded Blackstone 
*   Scaffolding 
*   Skeleton Skull 
*   Wither Skeleton Skull 
*   Zombie Skull
